name: oh-my-mlip
description: Self-healing MLIP installer for Claude Code — one slash command installs, compiles, and verifies any of 20+ ML interatomic potential frameworks on GPU with zero human intervention.

plugins.name: oh-my-mlip
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for oh-my-mlip: /oh-my-mlip:setup <model> installs the model env, runs first-run compilation where needed, and verifies energy+force on GPU via single_point.py — all in a self-healing loop backed by AGENTS.md recovery strategies.
